englishDefinitions: A casual way to say that a situation, rule, or feature involving being topless starts or takes effect.
Used humorously or informally when a particular unusual part of an event begins.
persianTranslation: وقتی بخش بدون لباس بالاتنه شروع می‌شود
وقتی آن قضیهٔ تاپلِس شروع می‌شود
شروع شدن آن بخش خاص یا عجیب
examples: The joke gets awkward when the topless thing kicks in.
I thought it was a normal beach party until the topless thing kicks in.
In the movie, the scene changes completely when the topless thing kicks in.
